description_long: This stool features an hourglass-shaped body with a rich, dark wood texture forming the main structure. The top surface is a wide, circular, white platform adorned with delicate floral line art, adding a decorative touch. The base mirrors the top in diameter, providing stability, while the midsection narrows dramatically, creating a sculptural silhouette. The wood grain is visible throughout the body, giving it a natural and elegant appearance. The stool lacks a backrest or footrest, emphasizing its minimalist and modern design. Its smooth surfaces and artistic top make it suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban environments.
description: A modern, hourglass-shaped wooden stool with a wide white top featuring floral line art and a smooth, sculptural silhouette.
description_view_0: The stool's white top with floral art and the narrowing wooden midsection are clearly visible, highlighting the hourglass form.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the floral design on the top and the symmetry of the hourglass shape, with the wood grain prominently displayed.
description_view_2: The floral art on the top is partially visible, and the curvature of the wooden body is accentuated from this angle.
description_view_3: The stool's top and base are aligned, showing the full width of the white surface and the continuous wood grain pattern.
